title: mussaenda microdonta subsp. odorata
intro: Mussaenda microdonta subsp. odorata, also known as the fragrant mussaenda, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Mussaenda microdonta subsp. odorata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety should be further studied.
